reports.note: Report generator runs unchanged. 3 of 5 inputs ready. 2 inputs blocked — report cannot complete without them.

condition_correlation_state.json — COND-PSIG-XXX namespace requires signal-type association (partial mapping only for compound zone)

condition_correlation_state.json — PZ-001 compound zone condition normalization available
reports.blocking_reason: signal_projection is the root blocker. Without FastAPI-compatible signal values (PSIG-001/002), the diagnostic narrative cannot correctly characterize coupling signals. pressure_zone_state DOMAIN_ZONE schema can be reformatted once signal_projection is unblocked.
reports.note: DOM layer derivation (BLOCK_D) advances tier2 readiness: zone-to-DOM mapping now available. This is a partial unblocking for BI-03 within tier2 context. Primary blocker remains BI-02 (signal scale).

additional_asset.note: BlueEdge decision_state.json (decision_category=INVESTIGATE, vault_readiness=NOT_READY) is native BlueEdge evidence with no FastAPI equivalent. Per RULE-03 and RULE-04: not used to redesign the decision report or introduce new downstream model. Documented as additional BlueEdge-native asset.
